final_value: Optimise and personalise digital customer journeys across touchpoints, with a focus on post-purchase engagement and conversion.
Manage e-commerce capabilities, including product configurators and an accurate e-catalogue.
Lead implementation of new digital functionalities and tools in alignment with the global core model.
Own website and content management, including landing pages, personalised experiences and SEO-optimised content.
Drive SEO, analytics and performance monitoring using data and KPIs.
Design and execute email-marketing and customer-engagement initiatives.
Ensure digital initiatives comply with Quality, Health, Safety and Environmental standards.

stamp_1.check: Each extracted duty appears in the explicit 'What you will do?' section.

stamp_2.check: Candidate requirements and benefits are excluded from the responsibility list.

evidence: Optimise and personalise digital customer journeys
Lead the implementation of new digital functionalities and tools
Drive SEO, analytics and performance monitoring
compliance with Quality, Health, Safety and Environmental standards

final_value: Hold a degree in Marketing, Communications, Business or a related field, or possess equivalent experience.
Have at least 5 years of experience in digital marketing or a related role.
Have hands-on experience with SEO, email marketing and digital analytics tools.
Possess strong organisational and administrative skills.
Be able to manage multiple projects and deadlines in parallel.
Be an excellent communicator and copywriter.
Understand web-content management and social-media best practices.
Demonstrate a customer-focused mindset, creativity and attention to detail.
Work collaboratively across teams and support local commercial strategy.
Be open to occasional national and limited international travel.

stamp_1.check: All extracted criteria appear in the direct 'What about you?' candidate-requirements section.

stamp_2.check: The degree, experience, technical exposure, communication, organisation, stakeholder and travel requirements are all retained without adding unlisted tools.

evidence: degree in Marketing, Communications, Business or a related field
SEO, email marketing and digital analytics tools
occasional national and limited international travel

stamp_1.check: No qualification is marked preferred, ideal, optional, a plus or nice to have.

stamp_2.check: Equivalent experience is an alternative to the degree, not a preferred qualification.
